title: Open USD and the Questions 140 Logos Don't Answer
message_html: Open USD and the Questions 140 Logos Don't Answer ...
snippet: On June 30, an independent company called Open Standard launched a dollar stablecoin, Open USD, and 140 of the biggest names in money signed on. Visa. Mastercard. BlackRock. BNY. Coinbase. Stripe. Circle’s stock fell as much as 17% the same day, which tells you the market read this as more than a pr
